gaps_detected.justification: WAI framework protocols and teaching infrastructure require dedicated advisors for architecture (archie), history/evolution tracking (historian), and timeline/expedition management (expediter)
Multiple open signals about git hooks, bash automation, wheel-tender pipeline, and deployment infrastructure require dedicated monitoring (will)
Project identity is documentation and prompt library; requires dedicated writing and content quality review (clara)
Station Master architecture, schema evolution, and protocol decisions require dedicated architecture oversight (archie)
GitHub Actions integration failures, browser-surface smoke coverage, and lug status validation require dedicated quality monitoring (jordy)
Auth-related concerns (NEXTAUTH_URL), secrets management, and compliance-related issues in open signals require dedicated security review
